properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v6 v3 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Humbly I stand, an offering, With open hands, Lord, I bring,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Everything and nothing less, My best, my all, You deserve my every breath, My life, my song.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I surrender, I surrender all, Oh, I surrender, I surrender all.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord take control, I trust You, I'm letting go, to give You,

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Everything and nothing less, I give You, Everything and nothing less forever, Everything and nothing less, Oh, my life is Yours Completely Yours.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Everything and nothing less, I give You, Everything and nothing less forever, Everything and nothing less, Oh, my life is Yours oh.
